sentences.english: Do you think having a pet teaches children responsibility?
sentences.korean: 반려동물 키우기가 아이에게 책임감을 가르친다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I absolutely believe that having a pet teaches children valuable lessons about responsibility.
sentences.korean: 반려동물이 아이들에게 책임감에 대한 소중한 교훈을 가르친다고 확실히 믿어요.

sentences.english: When a child has to feed walk and care for an animal every day they learn that another living being depends on them.
sentences.korean: 아이가 매일 동물에게 밥을 주고 산책하고 돌봐야 할 때 다른 생명체가 자신에게 의존한다는 걸 배워요.

sentences.english: This is very different from cleaning your room because the consequences of neglect are immediate and visible.
sentences.korean: 방 청소와는 매우 다른데 방치의 결과가 즉각적이고 눈에 보이기 때문이에요.

sentences.english: Also pets teach empathy — children learn to read an animal's emotions and respond to its needs.
sentences.korean: 또한 반려동물은 공감을 가르쳐요 — 아이들이 동물의 감정을 읽고 필요에 응하는 법을 배워요.

sentences.english: These are skills that will serve them well throughout their entire lives.
sentences.korean: 이것은 평생 동안 도움이 될 기술이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Best Way to Relieve Stress
The Role of Luck in Success
